0.title: Invocations Sum (by Region)
0.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries invocations_sum_by_region = avg(cloud.aws.events.invocations_sum_by_region), by: { dt.entity.custom_device_group }
| sort arrayAvg(invocations_sum_by_region) desc
| limit 20

1.title: Invocations Sum (by Region and RuleName)
1.query:
/*
Warning:

| sort arrayAvg(invocations_sum_by_region_rule_name) desc
| limit 20
